headline: These Industrial Stock Moves Send A Bullish Signal About The Economy
summary: Industrial stocks bucked a falling market on Thursday. The State Street Industrial Select Sector SPDR ETF popped back into in a buy zone, led by gap-ups and breakouts for CSX, RTX and others. Many holdings in this exchange traded fund delivered blowout earnings this week.

summary: PORTLAND, Ore. and HUNTINGTON BEACH, Calif., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DAT Freight & Analytics and Tai Software today announced an integration that lets freight brokers using Tai’s transportation management system (TMS) access Convoy Platform’s automated freight matching technology directly within Tai TMS. headline: Roper Technologies announces second quarter financial results
summary: Increases full year guidanceSARASOTA, Fla., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) reported financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026. Second quarter 2026 highlights Revenue increased 9% to $2.11 billion; organic revenue was +5% and acquisition contribution was +3%GAAP DEPS increased 233% to $11.62; adjusted DEPS increased 10% to $5.38GAAP operating cash flow increased 16% to $469 million; adjusted free cash flow increased 11% to $447 millionR

headline: Lockheed Martin, Quest Diagnostics, Thermo Fisher Scientific And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursday
summary: U.S. stocks were down as Dow Jones fell 450 points on Thursday. Lockheed Martin (LMT) shares rose 11.4% on better-than-expected results. Other big gainers were NVE Corp (NVEC), Gibo Holdings Ltd (GIBO), Novocure Ltd (NVCR), Cleveland-Cliffs Inc (CLF), Merlin Inc (MRLN), Medpace Holdings Inc (MEDP), Oatly Group AB (OTLY), Imax Corp (IMAX), United Rentals Inc (URI), Oceaneering International Inc (OII), and Quest Diagnostics Inc (DGX).

headline: Roche (SWX:ROP) Appoints Dan Malarek To Lead Its North America Diagnostics Business
summary: Roche Holding (SWX:ROP) has appointed Dan Malarek as President and CEO of Roche Diagnostics North America. The leadership change affects one of Roche’s key operating segments within its broader healthcare business. Malarek previously led Foundation Medicine, a Roche affiliate focused on precision medicine and genomic insights. Roche Holding’s diagnostics arm sits at the center of how the company supports hospitals, labs, and clinicians with testing platforms and data driven tools. As...
